name: VOUVOU Large Capacity Hay Storage Bag with Zip Portable Handles Portable Waterproof Horse Feeder Bag Livestock Hay Bags for Horses Goat 41 x 18 Inch
description: Description: Large capacity hay storage bag saving time and effort to refill the bag over and over. A hay bag is very necessary to have as it helps ease waste by keeping hay contained and off the ground, making the stable tidied up.  Feature: [Large Capacity]Easy to fill with an extra-large opening at the top, good large size that holds plenty of hay. [Good Ventilation]The hay bale cover bag can keep hay dry and product ventilation. Keep livestock's food in good dry condition. [Easy to Hanging]Comes with a sturdy hanging strap on top which makes it easy to hang anywhere, whether it's in stable
